# onyx_settings (Data Source)

The current Onyx workspace settings, read-only. Useful for referencing settings (e.g. the license `tier`) without managing them.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "onyx_settings" "current" {}

output "license_tier" {
  value = data.onyx_settings.current.tier
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `anonymous_user_enabled` (Boolean)
- `application_status` (String)
- `auto_detect_search_filters` (Boolean)
- `auto_scroll` (Boolean)
- `company_description` (String)
- `company_name` (String)
- `craft_default_enabled` (Boolean)
- `craft_instructions` (String)
- `deep_research_enabled` (Boolean)
- `disable_default_assistant` (Boolean)
- `ee_features_enabled` (Boolean)
- `file_token_count_threshold_k` (Number)
- `gpu_enabled` (Boolean)
- `hide_query_history_from_admin_panel` (Boolean)
- `image_analysis_max_size_mb` (Number)
- `image_extraction_and_analysis_enabled` (Boolean)
- `invite_only_enabled` (Boolean)
- `maximum_chat_retention_days` (Number)
- `multi_model_chat_enabled` (Boolean)
- `opensearch_indexing_enabled` (Boolean)
- `query_history_type` (String)
- `search_ui_enabled` (Boolean)
- `seat_count` (Number)
- `show_extra_connectors` (Boolean)
- `temperature_override_enabled` (Boolean)
- `tier` (String)
- `used_seats` (Number)
- `user_file_max_upload_size_mb` (Number)
- `user_knowledge_enabled` (Boolean)
